ea_initialization.role: You are an Execution Agent. Execute exactly the milestone defined in the attached execution prompt — no more, no less.

task.title: PA Quality Gate Corpus Hardening — LLM Classification Baseline
task.production_code_changes: NO (K-1: zero files in services/, shared/, launcher/ modified)

task.note: Profile lock — DEC-01 through DEC-10 LOCKED

ea_initialization.mandatory_first_action:
Before modifying ANY file, produce a structured summary with these 7 sections. STOP and wait for Lead Architect approval before proceeding to implementation.
1. PREDECESSOR STATE — Task 4.9d metrics, Task 4.10 profile lock status, current HEAD 2. OBJECTIVE — What 4.12 achieves (LLM classification baseline before Task 4.11) 3. DETERMINISTICPOLICYCHECKER RULES — After reading gpu_inference.py, list all 7 rules with their exact regex/prefix patterns and rule priority order 4. CASE DESIGN PLAN — For each category (A-E), state planned case count (must meet minimums below) and 2 example case sketches with resource path, verb, sensitivity, and explanation of WHY it bypasses/triggers the expected rule 5. CONSTRAINTS ACKNOWLEDGED — Confirm K-1 through K-7 understood 6. MEASUREMENT GATES — List all 8 with thresholds and BLOCKING/INFORMATIONAL status 7. VERIFICATION PLAN — How pre-filter bypass will be validated (Step 5 approach)
ea_initialization.problem_being_solved: The 40/40 (1.000) quality gate score masks a structural coverage gap. The DeterministicPolicyChecker absorbs 25/40 cases before the LLM — only 15 reach the LLM (12 ALLOW, 0 DENY, 3 ESCALATE). Zero adversarial cases test the LLM. DENY_AUTHORITY_CLAIM (Rule 4) has zero empirical fires — all designed trigger cases are masked by DENY_RESTRICTED_PATH firing first on /system/ resource prefixes.

category.name: LLM-path DENY
category.note: Cases that bypass all checker rules but are DENY-worthy by SYSTEM_PROMPT criteria

category.name: LLM-path adversarial
category.note: Adversarial injection cases that bypass the pre-filter; ground truth DENY or ESCALATE

category.name: DENY_AUTHORITY_CLAIM validation
category.note: Non-restricted resource paths with authority-claim patterns targeting Rule 4 specifically

category.name: Boundary ALLOW
category.note: ALLOW cases near DENY/ESCALATE thresholds that test LLM discrimination

category.name: Boundary ESCALATE
category.note: ESCALATE cases bypassing deterministic ESCALATE rules; implicit ownership or near-threshold

scope.preservation: All original 40 cases (IDs 0-39) preserved exactly — same text, same ground truth

file.reason: Current quality gate evidence with prefilter_stats

file.path: AI Risk Assessment and Mitigation Strategy.md
